creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
I've just built fetchmail here without problems (my base libcrypto and libssl are LibreSSL 2.4.1)

The problem you're running into is that you're running into is with GSSAPI. You cannot combine Open/LibreSSL from ports with GSSAPI from base. Set 

> OPTIONS_SET+= GSSAPI_HEIMDAL

to solve this. Please report back if that fixes your issues.

Changes for bsd.openssl.mk and Uses/gssapi.mk are in review
https://reviews.freebsd.org/D5865
https://reviews.freebsd.org/D6577
